# TRIPNEXUS - Travel Agency Lead Management System

## Project Structure
- **frontend/**: React.js + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS
- **backend/**: Node.js + Express.js + PostgreSQL
- **database/**: Schema and seed data

## Architecture Overview
- Lead Management System with automated workflows
- Admin dashboards and agent interfaces
- Real-time notifications
- PDF generation and sharing
- Role-Based Access Control (Admin/Agent)

## Key Features Implemented
- Lead capture and auto-categorization
- Follow-up scheduler with task automation
- Triple-lock availability matrix
- Itinerary builder with PDF generation
- Payment tracking and booking confirmation
- Kanban-style pipeline dashboard
- Client 360° profile
- Booking health score calculation

## Setup Instructions
See [README.md](../README.md) for detailed setup and execution instructions.
